package fixture

import "context"

type EarlyReturnThen struct{}

func (m EarlyReturnThen) Encode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	t := mustTenant(ctx)
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		if t.MajorVersion() >= 95 {
			w.WriteByte(1)
			return w.Bytes()
		}
		w.WriteInt(2)
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}
